zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Moigne MP於1354年5月28日出生在英國英格蘭多瑟特奧維爾莫尼時，他的父親Henry Le Moigne28歲，母親Joan Veel20歲。他於1373年之前與Joan Belvale在英國結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。他去世於1429年8月20日在英國英格蘭多瑟特享年75歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾霍斯利。

nameMeanings.name: Moigne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from moine ‘monk’, probably applied as an occupational name for a servant at a monastery or an ironic nickname for someone of monkish behavior or appearance. Compare Lemoine .

variants.name: Lemoine
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Emile, Normand, Jacques, Jean-Pierre, Lucien, Pierre, Aime, Clovis, Gaston, Marcel.

French: from Old French moine monk (from Latin monacus), with fused masculine definite article le, probably an occupational name for a servant at a monastery or an ironic nickname for someone of monkish behavior or appearance. Compare Lemoyne and Moine .

History: This surname is listed (in the form Le Moine) in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors (along with its variant or altered form Le Moyne) and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America. — In North America, this surname was originally also a secondary surname or dit (‘also called’) name, now found e.g. among the descendants of Jean Guyon du Buisson from France (see Guyon ), through Joseph Guyon dit Lemoine.

variants.name: Moinet
meanings: French: diminutive of   Moine   ‘monk’. Compare   Monet  .

variants.name: Moniot
meanings: from Old French moniot, a diminutive of moine ‘monk’ (see Moine ).
from a shortened pet form of Simon or another personal name ending in -mon, such as Aymon (see Aymond ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Moigne MP was born on 28 May 1354, in Owermoigne, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Henry Le Moigne, was 28 and his mother, Joan Veel, was 20. He married Joan Belvale before 1373, in England. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. He died on 20 August 1429, in Dorset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 75, and was buried in Horsley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Preston, Somerset, England: Preston by Milverton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Moigne MP est né le 28 mai 1354, à Owermoigne, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry Le Moigne, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Joan Veel, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Joan Belvale avant 1373, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. Il est décédé le 20 août 1429, à Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à Horsley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Preston, Somerset, England: Preston by Milverton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Moigne MP am 28. Mai 1354 in Owermoigne, Dorset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Le Moigne 28 und seine Mutter Joan Veel 20. Er hat vor 1373 in England Joan Belvale geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Töchter. Er starb am 20. August 1429 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Dorset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Horsley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Moigne MP è nato il il 28 maggio 1354 nel Owermoigne, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Henry Le Moigne, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Joan Veel, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Joan Belvale prima del 1373, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figlie. Morì il 20 agosto 1429, nel Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolto a Horsley, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Moigne MPが1354年5月28日にイギリスイギリスドールセトオウエルモイグンで生まれた時，父Henry Le Moigneは28歳，母Joan Veelは20歳であった。1373年以前にイギリスでJoan Belvaleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。彼は1429年8月20日にイギリスイギリスドールセトで75歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアホールスリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Preston, Somerset, England: 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 프레스턴 비 미버턴
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Moigne MP(이)가 1354년 5월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 오워모익니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Le Moigne(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Veel(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1373년 이전 영국에서 Joan Belvale(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1429년 8월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 호르슬리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Moigne MP nasceu em 28 de maio de 1354, em Owermoigne, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Henry Le Moigne, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Joan Veel, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Belvale antes 1373, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de agosto de 1429, em Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 75 anos, e foi sepultado em Horsley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Preston, Somerset, England: престон би милвиртон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Moigne MP родился 28 мая 1354 г. в местности оуирмоигн, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Henry Le Moigne было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Veel, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Belvale перед 1373 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. Он умер 20 августа 1429 г. в местности дорсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности хаурсли, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Joan Belvale antes de 1373, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijas. Murió el 20 de agosto de 1429, en Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultado en Horsley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
